title: A FAB plane carried out an evasive maneuver to avoid collision with a UFO in Rio de Janeiro [1980]
excerpt: A plane of the Brazilian Air Force, FAB C-115 2350, on August 26th, 1980, with 4 people on board, was flying between Santa Maria, State of Rio Grande do Sul and Rio de Janeiro-RJ, and when they were near São João do Meriti, State of Rio de Janeiro, the plane had to carry out an […]
text_preview:
## A plane of the Brazilian Air Force, FAB C-115 2350, on August 26th, 1980, with 4 people on board, was flying between Santa Maria, State of Rio Grande do Sul and Rio de Janeiro-RJ, and when they were near São João do Meriti, State of Rio de Janeiro, the plane had to carry out an evasive maneuver to avoid collision with a UFO.

Reports from the military on board the plane FAB C-115 2350. Translation:

## Colonel-Av F.B.M.M.

“At 5:50 pm, on the 26th of August 1980, as a crew member of the C-115 2350, when leaving the “Caxias Position”, at an altitude of 2.000ft, under VFR conditions, with “Me
summary: FAB C-115 aircraft performed evasive maneuver to avoid collision with an intense unidentified light near São João de Meriti-RJ on Aug 26, 1980; four military crew witnessed it.
